en_title: Halo Studios Reportedly Cancels New Multiplayer Project
cn_title: 光环工作室据称取消新多人项目
subtitle: 大型团队战项目告吹
opus_summary: 消息称代号Ekur的全新《光环》多人游戏已被取消。该项目由Certain Affinity参与开发，源自大逃杀项目Tatanka，原本探索超大型团队战与撤离模式。

paragraphs.en: A brand new Halo multiplayer game has been scrapped, according to sources.
paragraphs.cn: 据消息人士称，一款全新的《光环》多人游戏已被取消。

paragraphs.en: A popular Halo YouTuber known as Rebs Gaming has reported that a new multiplayer project set in the beloved sci-fi universe was recently cancelled. This report was also backed up by Windows Central's Jez Corden , who stated that the news was "100% true."
paragraphs.cn: 知名《光环》YouTube博主Rebs Gaming报道称，一款以这个广受喜爱的科幻宇宙为背景的新多人项目近期被取消。Windows Central的Jez Corden也为该报道背书，称消息「100%属实」。

paragraphs.en: The new game was codenamed 'Ekur,' and was being worked on by Certain Affinity, a studio that has done a lot of support work on previous Halo and Call of Duty titles. The game's origins began in a totally different project known as 'Tatanka,' which was a battle royale-esque Halo game.
paragraphs.cn: 这款新游戏代号为「Ekur」，由Certain Affinity参与开发。该工作室曾为多部《光环》和《使命召唤》作品提供大量支持。项目最初源自完全不同的「Tatanka」，后者是一款类似大逃杀的《光环》游戏。

paragraphs.en: However, that was scrapped in favor of Ekur, which was described as a "super big team battle idea," pulling from Halo's history of large-scale multiplayer modes. Halo 5's Warzone mode was seen as a source of inspiration, as well, and the team also toyed with an extraction mode. The project would've used the map that was built for Tatanka and was being developed in Unreal Engine, not unlike the upcoming Halo: Combat Evolved remake .
paragraphs.cn: 不过，Tatanka随后被放弃，团队转向Ekur。后者被形容为一种「超大型团队战构想」，借鉴《光环》系列过往的大规模多人模式。《光环5》的战争地带模式也是灵感来源，团队还尝试过撤离模式。项目原计划沿用为Tatanka打造的地图，并使用Unreal Engine开发，与即将推出的《光环：战斗进化》重制版类似。

paragraphs.en: It's unclear if the goal was to make a multiplayer Halo game that had a broader appeal after Infinite failed to capture a consistent audience, or if it would've been a premium title. Nevertheless, the project supposedly met its end after development troubles on Campaign Evolved, which pulled staff away from the multiplayer project. Whether this game ever sees the light of day is totally up in the air. It's possible it could be revived, especially as Microsoft is trying to inject some life into its biggest franchises right now . It doesn't seem like this was canned as a result of , so hopefully it can find its way back.
paragraphs.cn: 尚不清楚该项目的目标，是在《光环：无限》未能留住稳定玩家群后打造一款受众更广的多人《光环》，还是推出一款付费作品。据称，《光环：战役进化》开发遇到问题并从多人项目抽调人手，最终导致Ekur终止。这款游戏未来能否重见天日仍完全未知。它仍有可能复活，尤其是微软目前正试图为旗下最大IP重新注入活力。它似乎并非因为[原文此处缺失内容]而被砍，因此希望它还能回来。

paragraphs.en: Although Halo Infinite's servers remain active, the game's player base isn't very lively. It seems hard to imagine that Microsoft would want to keep Halo's multiplayer benched for the foreseeable future, especially with a new Xbox console on the horizon. Campaign Evolved is, as the title implies, a single-player game with the option of co-op. But for those craving a competitive PVP multiplayer experience, they'll have to wait a while.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管《光环：无限》的服务器仍在运行，但玩家群体并不活跃。尤其是在新一代XBOX主机即将到来的情况下，很难想象微软愿意让《光环》多人模式在可预见的未来一直坐冷板凳。《光环：战役进化》顾名思义是一款可选合作模式的单人游戏，而渴望竞技PVP多人体验的玩家还得再等一段时间。
